summary: simpleMeTTa evaluates HE/PeTTa programs correctly and within acceptable slowdown.

acceptance_criteria.requirement: HE core profile features are executable in simple runtime.
HE fixture parity against Hyperon uses bag equivalence (order-insensitive, multiplicity-preserving).
reference vs compiled path has zero semantic drift on strict targets.
heavy-corpus runtime is <=10x PeTTa baseline (agreed median ratio gate).
No unresolved proof placeholders in touched conformance/theory files.
